home.heroDescription: A simple, privacy-first form builder for Canadian businesses. All data stored on Canadian servers — no US transfers.
home.featureBuilderDesc: Build forms in minutes with an intuitive editor. No code required.
home.featureDataDesc: All data stored in AWS ca-central-1. Your data never leaves the country.
home.featureNotifyDesc: Get email alerts the moment someone submits a response. Export to CSV anytime.
home.shakespeareQuote: Mine eye hath play'd the painter and hath stell'd / Thy beauty's form in table of my heart.

auth.loginWithNewPassword: Log in with your new password
